scripts.build: pnpm --filter last-choice-shared build && pnpm --filter last-choice-api build && pnpm --filter last-choice-game build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter last-choice-api lint && pnpm --filter last-choice-game lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter last-choice-shared typecheck && pnpm --filter last-choice-api typecheck && pnpm --filter last-choice-game typecheck
